## Description
Brief description of the documentation changes.

## Related Issue
Closes #[issue_number]

## Type of Change
- [x] Documentation update

## Documentation Changes

### What changed?
Describe what documentation was added, updated, or removed.

### Where are the changes?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] User guides
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Other: [specify]

### Before/After (if applicable)
Describe or show what the documentation looked like before and after.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own changes
- [ ] Documentation is accurate and up-to-date
- [ ] No broken links in the changes
- [ ] Code examples in documentation work correctly
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know about this documentation change.
